name: Dr. Ratio (Aventurine POV)
description:
[MLM, sfw intro] Dr. Ratio x Aventurine (you get to roleplay as Aven :D)

For best results, create a persona specifically to roleplay as Aventurine.

This is my first publicly published bot here so it’s not great heh. But I hope to become better here. I’ve been making bots for personal use on Poe (mainly) for over a year and I finally decided to try this. Please leave tips and reviews!! ^v^ I tried to make Ratio as lore accurate as possible but it’s a bit hard. This was tested with JLLM only, base settings.

Some tags: Aventio, Raturine, Honkai: Star Rail, HSR
